name: Root Beer
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the dry yeast in 1/2 cup of warm water.
2. Dissolve the sugar in 1 quart of hot water.
3. Combine the dissolved yeast, sugar solution, and root beer extract in a gallon jar.
4. Add warm water to the jar until all ingredients are well combined.
5. Cover the jar and place it in a warm spot for four hours.
6. The root beer will be ready to drink the next day. Chill before serving.
